basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitc.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering equivalent with (6.0 CGPA/60 %) or Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering equivalent with (6.0 CGPA/60 %)
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering equivalent with (6.0 CGPA/60 %) or Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering equivalent with (6.0 CGPA/60 %). Desirable: Experience in projects related to interfacial phenomena, high speed imaging, and image analysis.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering equivalent with (6.0 CGPA/60 %) or Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering equivalent with (6.0 CGPA/60 %). Desirable: Experience in projects related to interfacial phenomena, high speed imaging, and image analysis.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's Degree in Mechanical Engineering with at least 6.0 CGPA or 60%, or a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering with the same academic standing.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, experience in projects related to interfacial phenomena, high-speed imaging, and image analysis is considered desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 28 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the NIT Calicut Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is NIT Calicut located?
faq.answer: National Institute of Technology Calicut is located in Calicut, Kerala.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is JRF/ANRF/ECRG/2025/004527/ENS.
